title: Hazel Oak
body:
Transform your Minecraft landscape with the enchanting hazel-colored oak trees! 

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/842242a5ab7050dad69cfcb659c4536c69164357_0.webp)

These unique trees feature rich, warm hues of hazel that add a touch of autumnal beauty to any biome.
Their sturdy trunks and vibrant foliage create a stunning contrast against the game's lush greenery.
Perfect for building serene forests or cozy woodland retreats, hazel oak trees bring a new level of charm and character to your world. 

Explore and enjoy the vibrant aesthetic these trees provide!
***

## **Support the work**

If you enjoy what I create, supporting the page helps me spend more time on updates, polishing features, fixing issues, and creating new content for future releases.

Every bit of support helps keep development going — thank you for making the next update possible.  

[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1256117/description_64c320a5-8d4b-4911-97d9-ae44570af17c.png)](https://www.patreon.com/Azturax)
